title: Funwhole Factory-House-of-Music Building Set with Light,City Street Fusion Modular Blocks, 2654 Pcs, Toy Gift for Adults & Music & Street Culture Enthusiasts, F9068
features: [Streetstyle Brick Set – Integrate Urban Art into Your Collection] 49 printed bricks create four graffiti backdrops and numerous stage accessories. This converted old factory brings a fresh musical atmosphere and authentic, creative street-art flair to your modular city

[Create Your Own Stage Atmosphere] Benefit from 24 integrated lights and 10 colour combinations. The practical switch allows you to easily change between performance and rest modes for realistic stage moments
[Enjoy Flexible Play] With the unique foldable sliding door and quickly removable roof and wall elements, you can design your LiveHouse as an indoor concert or an open-air event

[Set the Scene for Creative Stories] Six original mini-figures – from the confident rapper to the reggae fan, hip-hop lover, talent scout, experienced DJ, and dedicated stage crew – provide the ideal set for telling your own urban adventures

[Elegant Packaging & High Compatibility] The stylish packaging harmonises perfectly with other modular brick brands, making this set the ideal gift for birthdays, parties, and all lovers of street culture and music
[How to Turn on the Lights] Operates via USB port or battery pack (batteries not included, requires 3× AA)
